content.text:
<user_query>
In a previous session we created @lib/constants-home.ts but decided to not use a separat const file instead leaving the const definition wihtin the page.tsx because it was single use. It seems when reverting the change, you didn't delete the file. Please check if the const are defined in the page.tsx and then delete the @lib/constants-home.ts file
</user_query>

Confirming: `app/page.tsx` defines `FEATURES` (lines 17–32) with the same content as `HOME_FEATURES` in `lib/constants-home.ts`. No other file imports `constants-home` or `HOME_FEATURES`. Deleting the unused file.

Summary:

- **In `app/page.tsx`:** The feature list is defined as `FEATURES` (lines 17–32) with the same three items (BrainCircuit, GraduationCap, Trophy) and the same titles/descriptions as in the removed file.
- **No other references:** Nothing in the repo imports `constants-home` or `HOME_FEATURES`.

`lib/constants-home.ts` has been deleted. The home page continues to use the in-page `FEATURES` constant.
